finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_10.md:495 (unfinished turn: 'and then I’m really —'); chapters/chapter_10.md:529 (unfinished turn: 'Report it if you —'); chapters/chapter_10.md:535 (concrete practical ending: 'My refill’s in November. Just so you know.')
finding_results.notes: Three edits applied. (1) Replaced narrator-admiration line ('The frankness of it cut through...') and Rosa's anaphoric 'Because...' thesis speech with a friction-filled version: an unfinished turn ('and then I'm really —'), a blunt refusal to re-prove ('You felt it.'), and a concrete number anchor ('forty isn't three-eighty-nine'). (2) Replaced Rosa's second anaphoric 'I go back to...' speech and narrator-admiration paragraph ('She offered math, swelling...') with shorter, broken speech: concrete detail ('Cutting tablets. Trying to make the bottle last.'), a second unfinished turn ('Report it if you —'), and a blunt close ('Just don't tell yourself you helped me.'). (3) Replaced Rosa's two-part crafted exit speech ('Mine is forty dollars every three months...' and 'It isn't easy. It just isn't impossible the way CVS is.') with a single concrete practical line ('My refill's in November. Just so you know.') that ends the scene on a deadline rather than a thesis. Scene now contains at least two unfinished turns, one blunt refusal, multiple concrete pressure details, and ends without a polished summary of Rosa's ethical position.

summary: Single finding addressed: Rosa's post-'With what?' dialogue replaced polished anaphoric thesis speech with friction-filled spoken texture. Two unfinished turns added, narrator-admiration commentary removed, and scene ending changed from a crafted ethical summary to a concrete refill deadline. All other chapter content preserved. Heading contract, state deltas, continuity obligations, and tracked setups/payoffs unchanged.
